name: Val-d'Or Mining Corporation
description: Val-d'Or Mining Corporation is a junior natural resource issuer focused on project generation and early-stage exploration. The company is discovery-driven and partnership-focused, aiming to build shareholder value through the acquisition and development of mineral property assets. Its primary operations are concentrated in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt and other emerging mineral regions across Québec and Ontario. By advancing projects from initial exploration through to potential royalty creation, the company maintains a strategic approach to mineral resource development within the Canadian mining sector.
